name: Efrain Miranda Jr
text: Have been practicing (struggling) with yoga for several years and always at a YMCA. Therefore my exposure to instruction at a yoga studio is limited. However Nandini is obviously quite talented and qualified as a yoga instructor. What I like is that she varies the routines and always has an encouraging nature. She not only knows the poses in a general manner but understands the minute details of each pose and how the body reacts and responds when done properly. Her routines are challenging and effective.

name: Ann Turner
text: I have learned so much about my body from  Nandini. I joined yoga to improve balance, flexibility, and strength. She gives good instructions and help when needed and is always encouraging.

name: Thiyagu
text: It is a powerful experience to find a teacher as Nandini who truly serves as a bridge to the roots of a tradition like Ashtanga Yoga. Being guided by someone who embodies the lineage of the great masters—such of Krishnamacharya, Jois—often brings a depth to the practice that is transformational!

name: Linda Zeccola
text: I started taking class with Nandini about 3 years ago. This is the best yoga class I have taken in my life. I have been doing yoga since I was 14.  When I started in class, I thought I could never do a bridge with pushing my head off the ground. I also thought I could not do a headstand. And now I am doing both! I have gained flexibility and strength. Nandini brings a high level of understanding of yoga practice.  She cares about her students and builds confidence. She makes class joyful.

name: Raghu Siddapureddy
text: Nandini is a wonderful Ashtanga  instructor! She has a way of making a challenging practice feel accessible through constant encouragement and expert guidance. I always leave class feeling both physically stronger and mentally uplifted.

name: Archana
text:
I’ve been practicing Ashtanga yoga with Nandini for almost two years now, and my entire journey with Ashtanga started with her. This class means a lot to me personally, it’s not just another workout, but something I feel truly connected to.
Her teaching style is thoughtful, encouraging, and consistent, which has helped me grow both physically and mentally over time.
I’m genuinely grateful to be part of this class and this journey.

name: Michelle
text: Class with Nandini is a wonderful and challenging experience. I feel so much better afterwards. I feel balanced, stronger and peaceful. I highly recommend taking her class.

name: Laura McClellan
text: An amazing, intelligent, kind, and highly intuitive teacher and human being. Finding Nanidini was such a blessing — it’s not often you find teachers of this caliber. Thank you for everything Nandini!!

name: Rachel H.
text: I cannot state how awesome this class is. Nandini makes this class fun while moving your body in ways you would never believe possible. I started coming postpartum 4 years ago with no core strength and have improved so much. My posture has improved and it made my second pregnancy and recovery so much easier and quicker. I've always loved yoga, but what makes this class so special is how knowledgeable and an incredible teacher Nandini is. She guides everyone's posture and simple things like moving your chin 1 inch in a pose which improves the whole body affect. Everyone should take this class!

name: Santiago Garcia-Chavez
text: I have gone into this class thinking it would be easy because it was hosted at the Y but she has proven me wrong. She pushes people to learn new ways to move your body and encourages you to push yourself! She believes in her practice and believes in us to be able to push ourselves which i admire so much. I have went to those fancy hot yoga studios where its not as personal and you are already expected to learn these things, while in her class she is more hands on with each and everyone and she shows you how to do things because everyday its a new thing. I felt that in those fancy yoga studios it was the same old poses but not in her class, its always something new! She keeps things fresh! I love the way she teaches and will probably stay with her as long as i can!

name: Deb Saxton
text: My experience has been mind blowing. Nandini is such an incredible teacher. I've been coming for a number of years to her class and i still enjoy every moment. I've even grown a half an inch as measured by my medical team at an earlier visit. Yoga has been good to me. I feel more lumber and have less stiffness in the mornings and during my days. I highly genomes her class and i plan to continue for the foreseeable footie.

name: Saharsh Aggarwal
text: Great experience.

name: Brittis Truehardt
text: Starting minimal exposure over years, consistently practicing now for 4 months

name: Shannan
text: Life-changing! Nandini introduced me to ashtanga and I feel so lucky to be learning from her.  She knows everything! She helps each of her students grow in their practice by guiding us through fun, challenging classes with warm encouragement and accommodations for all skill levels. Thank you, Nandini! Can’t wait for your shala!

name: Emilia Edmonson
text: This is my first experience of coming regularly to practice yoga in a group. It has felt so calming, yet also physically challenged me in new ways. Nandini teaches us to respect our bodies and push ourselves with such grace and poise. She’s a truly special teacher.

name: Nevlyn
service: YMCA NW Family, Online, In person
text: I have been taking in-person and online classes with Nandini for many years. She is extremely knowledgable and my experience has been transformative. She meets you at your skill level safely (mine was xero when I started yoga).  I leave her classes feeling challenged and energized.  She is truly passionate about teaching and connecting with her students. Nandini is also Ayurveda trained and I've relied on her knowledge in this area many times. I highly recommend her for both services. I feel so lucky and blessed to have her in my life.

name: Cristina
text: Nandini is an excellent yoga instructor. I truly appreciate her level of knowledge and her positive and encouraging teaching style. Most of what we do in class is very accessible for everyone, and often includes preparation for a more challenging pose that Nandini first demonstrates,  then encourages us to attempt with her assistance. But she never pressures anyone to attempt a pose they're not comfortable with.  Her classes are welcoming and always beneficial and enjoyable.

name: Tatiana Karmanova
text: I’ve been doing yoga for many years, but I’ve never met such a knowledgeable and kind person as Nandini. She has an amazing knowledge of how the body works. Her classes are never dull or routine. She brings new challenges but doesn’t just throw new positions at you. Instead she methodically prepares us for them, stretching the needed muscles. She also understands the different levels of her students and accommodates her instruction offerings different alternatives. She is just amazing!

name: aseem grover
text: I truly enjoy practicing yoga with Nandini, a journey that began while I was still recovering from a serious knee injury sustained while playing soccer. My body felt stiff, inflexible, and I could barely touch my toes. With fairly regular practice, I began noticing remarkable changes, both physically and emotionally. My flexibility and strength improved steadily, and my confidence returned. Emotionally, I feel much calmer and more balanced, while my energy levels have noticeably increased. Nandini’s teaching style is thoughtful and effective; she pays close attention to detail, offers continuous pointers, and provides sustained challenges that keep every class engaging.

name: Miguel Leoni
text: Studying under Nandini has profoundly transformed both my physical practice and my overall well-being. Her approach extends far beyond the mechanics of poses — she cultivates awareness, discipline, and a genuine connection between mind and body, challenging each student at precisely the right level while keeping you supported and safe. The results reach into daily life: better posture, greater ease of movement, and a fluidity I once thought unattainable. Nandini teaches with clarity, patience, and a deep understanding of the practice, creating a space where growth feels both challenging and deeply rewarding. I cannot recommend her highly enough to anyone seeking to move better, feel better, and discover their own potential through yoga.

name: Eucaris Gonzalez
text: I have been following Nandini’s yoga classes throughout Austin for 2 years—she is, by far, one of the best instructors in town. Her yoga practice is intense but with her wealth of knowledge and experience she guides students through genuine progress and growth. I have benefited greatly from working with Nandini—I have improved my strength, balance, and stamina through my yoga practice which has allowed me to stay active in other areas of life and leisure.

name: Michael Nicosia
text: Nandini teaches Ashtanga yoga, which is very rare and something I didn’t know I wanted or needed until I found it. It has upped my skill in yoga in every way and I am fitter and more flexible than I’ve been since my 20s. It can take time to really get into the practice, but if you dedicate a few days a week it’s totally worth it.

name: Anna C
text: Nandini is the best! Her morning yoga classes motivates me to be the strongest version of myself.  Her flow is challenging but also very modifiable for any level. She always takes time during her class to walk and help correct posture (with permission) to maximize your stretch. You leave her class feeling amazing and wanting to come back to progress your practice more.
